political.s: Via parent company AT&T: FEC: $22K PAC donations; 77% to Republican, 23% to Democratic committees.  [CA CalAccess + NY COELIG + TX Ethics adds state-level totals.]

charity.s: Via parent company AT&T: $110M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.09% of revenue) via AT&T Foundation. Operates the At&T Foundation: $7.7M in charitable contributions, gifts & grants paid (FY2023, IRS Form 990-PF).

environment.s: Via parent company AT&T: CDP Climate Change: A- (2024) — leadership-band environmental disclosure with validated targets.

dei.s: Via parent company AT&T: HRC Corporate Equality Index: 100/100 — Equality 100 Leader (2025). Top-rated LGBTQ+ workplace policies, benefits, and culture. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

privacy.s: Via parent company AT&T: 1 documented breach affecting 49,102,176 accounts (HIBP); latest breach 2021-08-20.

execPay.s: Via parent company AT&T: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 215:1 (median employee pay $139,026) — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2026).

wiki.extract: U-verse TV is an internet protocol television (IPTV) service operated by DirecTV. Launched on June 26, 2006, U-verse was originally a triple play package that included broadband Internet, IP telephone, and IPTV services in 22 states.
